abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: By Your Side
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may discard a card to place itself in base contact with a unique ally within 12".

abilities.name: Power Converter
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, it may remove a Shielded token from itself to make a Scheme marker within 1".

actions.name: Compact Shotgun
actions.effects: Deal 1 damage to enemy models within (X)1" of the target.

triggers.name: Defensive Reflexes
triggers.text: This model gains a Shielded token.

actions.name: Partial Charge
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Construct only. Target heals 2. This model may drain a (fortitude) to give a model engaged with the target a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Extra Supplies
triggers.text: When resolving, the target heals an additional 1.

actions.name: Resupply
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per turn. Draw up to two cards from this model's discard pile with values of 1-5.
